feature.name: JSONPath parse, find, and update core
feature.description: Extract jsonpath-ng expression parsing and evaluation (including filter expressions) without CLI or original package import.
included_behaviors: parse JSONPath strings into expression objects
find matching values in dict/list document trees
update values at matching paths in place

entanglement.description: JSONPath couples lexer/parser grammar, AST node types, tree walking, filter evaluation, and in-place update semantics.
signals: PLY lexer/parser builds AST from path strings
ext filter parser adds comparison and @ context

output.import: import featurelifted; from featurelifted import parse; from featurelifted.jsonpath import JSONPath; from featurelifted.exceptions import JsonPathLexerError, JsonPathParserError
